name: Anika Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Anika Therapeutics, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on orthobiologics and regenerative solutions. Its product portfolio includes hyaluronic acid-based joint health treatments such as ORTHOVISC, MONOVISC, and CINGAL for osteoarthritis pain management, as well as surgical and regenerative products including HYALOFAST, HYALOBARRIER, TACTOSET, and INTEGRITY. The company develops and commercializes products targeting joint preservation and restoration across multiple musculoskeletal therapeutic areas.
